title: Nginx Reverse Proxy Headers Example
summary: Forward standard reverse proxy headers in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample upstream with a real application before validation.
If Nginx sits behind another trusted proxy, configure real-IP handling before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx proxy_set_header directive syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and an upstream app that can inspect forwarded headers on a staging host before use.
